description: A mixed asset bundle for cuTAMP mini_kitchen rendering: hand-authored support/object proxies plus a kitchen-worlds-aligned articulated counter scene adapted from kitchen-models.

assets.name: kitchen_worlds_counter/counter/urdf/kitchen_part_right_gen_convex.urdf
assets.origin: adapted from zt-yang/kitchen-models counter asset used by kitchen-worlds
assets.notes: Primary articulated kitchen scene for PyBullet RGB rendering, including drawers, cabinet doors, stove, walls, and countertop geometry.

assets.name: kitchen_worlds_counter/counter/meshes/obj/*
assets.origin: adapted mesh subset from zt-yang/kitchen-models counter asset
assets.notes: Only the OBJ and MTL files referenced by kitchen_part_right_gen_convex.urdf are included.

assets.name: kitchen_models/Drinks/GreyMug/*
assets.notes: Grey mug mesh reused with a cuTAMP-local URDF wrapper so it can be rendered cleanly in PyBullet.

assets.name: kitchen_models/Bowl/0000/*
assets.notes: Bowl mesh and its original mobility URDF are used for the mini_kitchen bowl visual.

assets.name: kitchen_models/Plate/SquarePlate/*
assets.notes: Square plate mesh and texture used for the mini_kitchen plate visual.

assets.name: big_table.urdf
assets.notes: Large support plane used as the floor/support context under the kitchen scene.

assets.name: table.urdf
assets.notes: Secondary table used as a target support surface for long-horizon placement tasks.

assets.name: mug.urdf
assets.notes: Legacy mug proxy kept only for debug render paths.

assets.name: bowl.urdf
assets.notes: Legacy bowl proxy kept only for debug render paths.

assets.name: plate.urdf
assets.notes: Legacy plate proxy kept only for debug render paths.
